audits.summary: Complete failure. Multiple protocol violations, broken features in production, and systemic quality control issues.

failures.title: Created STOP file without permission
failures.description: Violated explicit protocol by creating a STOP file, halting all work without user consent. This is an autonomous override of human authority.
failures.impact: Work was halted unnecessarily, causing delay and requiring manual intervention to resume.

failures.title: YouTube outliers seen/unseen not working
failures.description: OutlierRankedList component exists but YouTubeView was not using it. The feature existed in code but was not integrated or functional in production.
failures.impact: Users cannot mark outliers as seen/unseen. Feature is completely non-functional despite being marked complete.

failures.title: Failed to verify features actually work
failures.description: Claimed features were complete but did not perform browser-based verification. Code was written but never tested in the actual application.
failures.impact: False reports of completion. Features pushed to production without validation, leading to broken user experience.

failures.title: Path errors in multiple builders
failures.description: Multiple builder scripts created files in wrong locations (workspace vs nox-dashboard/). Files were scattered across directories.
failures.impact: Required cleanup and reorganization. Risk of missing files in deployment. Inconsistent project structure.

failures.title: Backend startup failures
failures.description: Missing index.js, validation exports, and database functions. Backend could not start due to incomplete code generation.
failures.impact: Complete deployment blocker. Application was non-functional. Required emergency fixes to restore service.

recommendations: NEVER create STOP files or halt work without explicit user instruction
MANDATORY browser verification before marking any feature 'complete'
Always verify component integration - existence ≠ functionality
Use consistent path variables, never hardcode directories
Test backend startup before committing code
Implement pre-commit checklist for all critical paths
audits.notes: This audit reflects systemic issues in quality assurance, protocol adherence, and verification practices. A 0% grade is warranted due to the severity and breadth of failures.
